## Red-zone changes

<!-- Mark anything reviewers must understand deeply before merging. -->

- [ ] Auth, authorization, token handling, or accessPolicy
- [ ] Input validation, data model, migrations, or core business rules
- [ ] Deploy, GitHub Actions, Nais manifests, or secrets
- [ ] Not applicable

## Testing

<!-- How was this tested? Which test commands were run? -->

- [ ] `make test-frontend` passes
- [ ] `make test-backend` passes
- [ ] Manually verified in dev (`make dev`)

## Preview and deploy

<!-- Required for UI, API, BFF, Nais, or workflow changes. -->

- [ ] PR preview URL works, or preview is not relevant
- [ ] Browser traffic stays same-origin through `/api/*`
- [ ] Backend remains internal unless auth/token forwarding is part of this PR
- [ ] PR preview TTL and cleanup behavior are documented when changed

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For UI changes, include before/after screenshots or a short recording. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Code is self-explanatory or commented where needed
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data committed
- [ ] Breaking changes are documented
- [ ] Review comments from earlier rounds are resolved or answered
